scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:client && npm run deploy:worker
scripts.deploy:client: npm run build:client && wrangler pages deploy client/dist --project-name=healing-practice-client --branch=main
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build:server && wrangler deploy --config server/wrangler.toml --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run deploy:client:staging && npm run deploy:worker:staging
scripts.deploy:client:staging: npm run build:client && wrangler pages deploy client/dist --project-name=healing-practice-client --branch=staging
scripts.deploy:worker:staging: npm run build:server && wrangler deploy --config server/wrangler.toml --env staging
